title: Office hours moved — this week only
message: Due to a faculty meeting, office hours this Thursday are moved to 3–5 PM in ENG 204. The Friday session remains the same.

title: Midterm review session — Monday 6 PM
message: Join us Monday evening for a 90-minute midterm review covering eigenvalues, vector spaces, and orthogonality. Zoom link in the course calendar.

title: Proposal draft grading rubric posted
message: The grading rubric for the Technical Proposal Draft has been posted to the Files section. Please review it before submitting on Monday.
